description: Run a command with automatic retries on failure.

platform.value_on_windows: No native retry loop; requires scripting boilerplate in PowerShell or batch
platform.value_on_unix: Simpler than shell retry loops; richer output with exit-code filtering and backoff

options.description: Structured JSON metadata for AI agents
Add random jitter to delay (50-100% of calculated value)
Write summary to stdout instead of stderr (errors still go to stderr)
Max retry attempts, not counting initial run (default: 3)
Backoff strategy: fixed, linear, exp (default: fixed)
Retry only on these exit codes (comma-separated)
Coloured output: auto (default when omitted), always, or never

exit_codes.description: Success (child returned 0) or child exit code pass-through (1–124)
Usage error: no command, bad retry arguments, invalid --on/--until list
Command not executable (permission denied, bad EXE format)

io.stdout: Child process stdout passes through unmodified
io.stderr: Progress lines and final JSON summary. Child stderr also passes through.

examples.description: Retry a build up to 3 times on failure
Retry only on specific exit codes
Stop when exit code matches target

composes_with.description: Watch tests with auto-retry on file change
Wait until a service port accepts connections (wait-for-it replacement)

json_output_fields.name: exit_code
json_output_fields.description: Tool exit code (retry's own return value — equal to child's on pass-through, or 125/126/127 on tool errors)

json_output_fields.name: exit_reason
json_output_fields.description: Machine-readable exit reason: succeeded, retries_exhausted, not_retryable, launch_failed, cancelled

json_output_fields.name: child_exit_code
json_output_fields.description: Final child process exit code, or null if the child never ran (e.g. launch_failed)

json_output_fields.name: total_seconds
json_output_fields.description: Total wall time including delays in seconds

json_output_fields.name: delays_seconds
json_output_fields.description: Actual delay durations between attempts in seconds
